parameters.name: vdd
parameters.override_behavior: sets the logic-high level and twice the CMPCK crossing threshold

parameters.name: td_cmp
parameters.override_behavior: sets output delay after clock events

modeling_constraints: Update decision state only at CMPCK crossings through vdd/2 and hold it between events.
Drive smooth voltage-coded outputs using td_cmp and tr.
Do not use current contributions, ddt(), idt(), validation hooks, testbench-specific sample points, or simulator-specific side channels.
problem_statement: the supplied system violates the public contract

properties.observable_contract: Both decision outputs initialize high at vdd.
Each falling CMPCK crossing through vdd/2 resets both DCMPN and DCMPP high.
On a rising CMPCK crossing with VINP greater than VINN, DCMPP is high and DCMPN is low.
On a rising CMPCK crossing with VINP less than VINN, DCMPN is high and DCMPP is low.
On a rising CMPCK crossing with equal differential inputs, both decision outputs become low.
The precharged or decided state holds between clock events and output changes use td_cmp delay and tr smoothing.

title: Clocked SAR Comparator
